overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy action RPG showing a hunter character exploring a gothic cathedral exterior and interior. The character walks through foggy courtyards with statues and gravestones, passes a robed NPC, and enters a grand hall with ornate staircases and mysterious green glowing architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cathedral exterior, observing the gothic architecture and dead trees

entered.detail: massive stone building with ornate gothic windows and pointed arches
large stone portal with steps leading up to the cathedral interior
twisted bare tree with no leaves, silhouetted against the foggy sky
weathered stone tiles covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the exterior of a massive gothic cathedral at night. The foggy atmosphere creates a hazy blue-green ambiance, with the building's ornate facade and tall windows dominating the view. Dead trees line the path as the character moves toward the main entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral courtyard with graveyard and statues

events.description: encounter a stationary robed NPC standing near the iron fence

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, passing stone statues and gravestones while approaching a robed figure

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing still near the iron fence, holding a staff or torch

entered.detail: tall stone pillars topped with humanoid statues lining the courtyard
weathered tombstones scattered across the dirt ground
tall wrought iron fence with pointed spikes enclosing the area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide courtyard filled with stone statues on pillars and scattered gravestones. The character walks past the cathedral facade now on the left, moving through the foggy graveyard. A robed NPC stands near the iron fence on the left as the character approaches the building entrance.

events.description: enter the cathedral through the massive stone portal, transitioning from outdoor courtyard to indoor grand hall

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the large entrance doorway into the cathedral interior

entered.detail: towering stone archway with heavy doors leading into the cathedral
vast interior space visible through the entrance with high ceilings
mysterious altar emitting bright green light at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive stone entrance of the cathedral, leaving the courtyard behind. Walking through the portal, the environment transitions from the foggy outdoor graveyard to the sheltered interior. A mysterious green glow emanates from deep within the grand hall ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral hall with ceremonial altar

events.description: begin ascending the right side of the bifurcated grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking up the grand staircase toward the upper levels, passing the green glowing altar structure

entered.detail: symmetrical stone staircases with ornate railings curving up both sides of the hall
large hanging light fixture suspended from the high ceiling
candle holders mounted on the walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: Inside the grand cathedral hall, the character moves toward a magnificent bifurcated staircase. The hall is dominated by a green glowing altar structure at the far end, illuminated by an ornate chandelier and wall sconces. The character begins ascending the right staircase, leaving the main floor below.

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor, examining the walls and looking for pathways

entered.detail: stone walls with decorative moldings and tapestries
patterned stone flooring with hexagonal shapes
ornate candle holders with multiple lit candles
arched doorways leading to other chambers

segments.scene_description: Having ascended to the upper level, the character explores a narrower corridor with hexagonal floor tiles and walls adorned with candelabras. The grand hall and its green altar are now below and behind, as the character moves through the dimly lit upper reaches of the cathedral.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the foggy, nocturnal exterior of a gothic cathedral into its glowing, ornate interior. It begins by tracking the character along a massive facade under a hazy blue-green sky, passing dead trees before the view opens into a wide courtyard filled with stone statues and scattered gravestones. As the character moves past a robed NPC near an iron fence, the scene shifts from the open graveyard toward the massive stone portal of the cathedral. Upon entering, the foggy atmosphere gives way to a sheltered grand hall dominated by a mysterious green glowing altar and a magnificent bifurcated staircase. The camera finally follows the character as they ascend the right stairs and move into a narrower upper corridor of hexagonal tiles and candelabras, leaving the illuminated main hall below.
